data.body:
Life of a freelancer

Me: Hey, um, where's my money? 
Client: We paid that 6 weeks ago!
Me: Can you check that, cause I did not get paid.
Client: We paid, I swear!
Client: 4 days after you invoiced!
Client: Oh, wait, looks like the payment didn't go through, sorry!
